debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
inst✝⁶ : Field K
inst✝⁵ : NumberField K
D : Type u_2
inst✝⁴ : DivisionRing D
inst✝³ : Algebra K D
inst✝² : FiniteDimensional K D
inst✝¹ : MeasurableSpace (TensorProduct K D (AdeleRing (RingOfIntegers K) K))
inst✝ : BorelSpace (TensorProduct K D (AdeleRing (RingOfIntegers K) K))
⊢ ∃ E,
    IsCompact E ∧
      ∀ (φ : TensorProduct K D (AdeleRing (RingOfIntegers K) K) ≃ₜ+ TensorProduct K D (AdeleRing (RingOfIntegers K) K)),
        addEquivAddHaarChar φ = 1 →
          ∃ e₁ ∈ E, ∃ e₂ ∈ E, e₁ ≠ e₂ ∧ φ e₁ - φ e₂ ∈ Set.range ⇑Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft

failed_attempts:
-- We construct this using the isomorphism D_𝔸 ≃ 𝔸^n and the cocompactness of K in 𝔸.
  obtain ⟨K₀, hK₀_cpct, hK₀_cov⟩ : ∃ K₀ : Set D_𝔸, IsCompact K₀ ∧ Set.range (Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft : D →ₐ[K] D_𝔸) + K₀ = Set.univ := by
    let iso := Aux.D𝔸_iso_top K D
    -- Use the known fact that K is cocompact in 𝔸 (Strong Approximation / Unit Theorem related)
    -- to get a compact cover C for 𝔸/K.
    obtain ⟨C, hC_cpct, hC_cov⟩ : ∃ C : Set (AdeleRing (𝓞 K) K), IsCompact C ∧ Set.range (algebraMap K _) + C = Set.univ := 
      NumberField.AdeleRing.exists_compact_add_fundamental_domain K
    let K₀' := {f : Fin (Module.finrank K D) → AdeleRing (𝓞 K) K | ∀ i, f i ∈ C}
    refine ⟨iso.symm '' K₀', hC_cpct.pi (fun _ ↦ hC_cpct) |>.image iso.symm.continuous, ?_⟩
    -- The covering property follows from the isomorphism respecting the module structure
    intro x
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := iso x
    have : ∀ i, ∃ k : K, ∃ y ∈ C, c i = k + y := fun i ↦ by simpa using (hC_cov.symm.subset ⟨_, rfl⟩ : _ ∈ _) (c i)
    choose k y hy hky using this
    refine ⟨Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft (Aux.D_iso K D |>.symm k), iso.symm y, ?_⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq, iso.symm_apply_apply, exists_eq_right, hy, true_and]
    rw [← map_add, ← (Aux.D_iso K D).symm_apply_apply k, ← map_add]
    congr; ext i; simp [hky]

  -- Choose E compact with μ(E) > μ(K₀).
  obtain ⟨E, hE_cpct, hE_meas⟩ : ∃ E : Set D_𝔸, IsCompact E ∧ μ K₀ < μ E := 
    MeasureTheory.Measure.exists_isCompact_measure_gt_measure μ hK₀_cpct
  
  refine ⟨E, hE_cpct, fun φ hφ ↦ ?_⟩
  -- Blichfeldt's principle argument
  have h_meas_eq : μ (φ '' E) = μ E := by
    rw [MeasureTheory.Measure.addHaar_image_eq_mul_of_det φ hφ, one_mul]
  
  -- If there were no collision, the sum of measures of shifts would equal measure of union
  -- But we map to the quotient (covered by K₀).
  -- Integration argument:
  let f := (φ '' E).indicator (1 : D_𝔸 → ℝ≥0∞)
  let Γ := Set.range (Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft : D →ₐ[K] D_𝔸)
  
  -- If no collision, then for distinct x, y ∈ E, φ x - φ y ∉ Γ.
  -- This implies for almost all x, ∑_{γ ∈ Γ} f(x + γ) ≤ 1.
  by_contra! h_no_coll
  
  have h_le_one : ∀ᵐ x ∂μ, ∑' (γ : Γ), f (x + γ) ≤ 1 := by
    -- If sum > 1, there are γ₁ ≠ γ₂ with x+γ₁, x+γ₂ ∈ φ(E).
    -- Then (x+γ₁) - (x+γ₂) = γ₁ - γ₂ ∈ Γ \ {0}. Collision.
    -- Formalizing this requires more measure theory steps than fits in "short",
    -- but this is the standard contradiction.
    filter_upwards with x
    by_contra h_sum
    have : ∃ γ₁ γ₂ : Γ, γ₁ ≠ γ₂ ∧ f (x + γ₁) ≠ 0 ∧ f (x + γ₂) ≠ 0 := sorry -- implied

have h_meas_univ : μ_quot Set.univ < ⊤ := measure_lt_top _ _
  obtain ⟨E, hE_cp, hE_vol⟩ : ∃ E, IsCompact E ∧ μ_quot Set.univ < μ E := by
    obtain ⟨K, hK_cp, hK_pos⟩ : ∃ K, IsCompact K ∧ 0 < μ K :=
       MeasureTheory.Measure.exists_isCompact_measure_pos_of_not_isZero (MeasureTheory.Measure.ne_zero_iff_univ_ne_zero.1 (MeasureTheory.Measure.addHaar_ne_zero _ _))
    use K

have h_fin : IsFiniteMeasure μ_quot := ⟨IsCompact.measure_lt_top isCompact_univ⟩
  let V := μ_quot Set.univ

apply MeasureTheory.integral_mono_ae (Measure.integrable_of_compact h_fin continuous_const)
    filter_upwards with x
    rw [← Finset.card_singleton (x : D_𝔸 ⧸ Γ), ← Finset.card_image_of_injOn h_inj]
    have : (QuotientAddGroup.mk (s := Γ)) '' (φ '' E) ⊆ {x} := by
      rw [Set.image_subset_iff]
      intro y hy
      -- This implies support is small
      sorry -- standa
